queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the association between the absence of a checking account and reduced credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Investigation into the contribution of critical account status or other existing credits to decreased credit risk exposure.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Statistical assessment of checking account balances below zero and their correlation with lower likelihood of loan default.
